headline: How Coca-Cola (KO) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Bottler Focus
summary: Coca-Cola's latest analyst update features a modest reset in price targets, with moves such as US$88 from US$85 and a series of US$1 to US$6 adjustments that keep the stock's valuation story in focus. These incremental changes are closely tied to recent conference commentary, where bullish firms highlight what they see as a supportive bottler centric message, while more cautious voices question how much is already priced in. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and...

headline: Assessing Ligand Pharmaceuticals (LGND) Valuation After Bank Of America’s New Buy Rating

headline: BofA’s Hartnett Warns Markets Are Starting to Look Like 2008
summary: “Asset performance in 2026 is more ominously close to price action seen from mid’07 to mid’08,” Hartnett said in a note.  Worries are increasing around banks’ exposure to private credit, an asset class grappling with fund redemptions, scrutiny of underwriting standards and the impact of artificial intelligence on some borrowers.
